2023 - 2025

Year-over-Year Import Volume Overview

Source: Panjiva Phase 07 Output | Analysis: 2023-2025

Year-over-Year Summary Statistics

Year Total_Tons Total_Value Shipment_Count Tonnage_Growth Value_Growth
2023 464.78M $874.63B 291.1K N/A N/A
2024 484.37M $766.17B 297.0K 4.2% -12.4%
2025 402.46M $526.58B 266.7K -16.9% -31.3%
Key Insights:
  • Comprehensive overview of import volumes, values, and shipment counts
  • Growth rate analysis reveals year-over-year trends
  • Multiple metrics provide context for market dynamics

Executive Summary

Analysis Overview:
  • Dataset: Panjiva Import Manifest Database (Phase 07 Enrichment)
  • Time Period: 2023-2025 (3 years)
  • Scope: US import flows by commodity, port, and origin country
  • Methodology: Year-over-year comparative analysis with growth rate calculations

Key Applications:
  • Strategic market intelligence for commodity supply chains
  • Port infrastructure planning and capacity analysis
  • Trade policy impact assessment
  • Competitive landscape monitoring
Source: Panjiva Phase 07 Output | Analysis: 2023-2025
